name: Borsalino (Reprint)
effect_text: [Opponent's Turn] This Character gains +1000 power and cannot be K.O.'d by effects.[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the artist credit (note the lack of pen symbol next to the artist name).
